script:
set +e
echo '=== inode + link count for each per-user .credentials.json ==='
for u in azureuser afrah aixa alejandro ashley heather kaye gabriel; do
  stat -c '%i links=%h mode=%a %U:%G %n' /home/$u/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
done
echo '=== runuser -u aixa -- id (verify supplementary groups in switch) ==='
runuser -u aixa -- id 2>&1
echo '=== runuser test 1: aixa stat its file ==='
runuser -u aixa -- stat /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1 | head -8
echo '=== try sg azureuser inside runuser ==='
runuser -u aixa -- sg azureuser -c 'head -c 30 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json' 2>&1
echo '=== su -l aixa (login shell, full group init) ==='
su -l aixa -s /bin/bash -c 'id; echo --; head -c 30 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json' 2>&1 | head -8
echo '=== try setpriv (explicit) ==='
setpriv --reuid=aixa --regid=aixa --init-groups head -c 30 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1 | head -3
echo '===END==='
